title: Gametracker Recipe Instance (NFC item tag, max 512 bytes)
required.title: Gametracker Recipe Instance (NFC item tag)
required.description: Payload written to NFC user memory. Must fit in 512 bytes. Compact JSON only (no whitespace, no $schema). UID is read from the chip, not stored in JSON.

scenario_name.description: Game scenario id. PDA rejects if != character.scenario_name
Game scenario this item belongs to. PDA rejects tag if != character.scenario_name

instance_id.description: NFC tag UID, hex without separators

equipped.description: true — worn on a character (signed with K_char); false — free item (signed with K_tag). Equip/unequip changes signing key

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 hex (64 chars). UID for signing is taken from the NFC chip

equipped.description: true — worn on a character (signed with K_char); false — free item (signed with K_tag). Equip/unequip changes signing key
